questions.question: Explain the concept of 'Use it or lose it' in the context of cloud capacity planning, and provide an example of how it affects an organization's wallet.

A company plans to deploy a cloud-based virtual desktop infrastructure (VDI) for its employees. The company has a cloud capacity of 1000 user-months. If the company expects to have 500 users with 8 hours of usage per month, calculate the actual cloud capacity required.
questions.hint: Use the formula: User-Months * Hours/Day * Days/Month

questions.question: A cloud provider offers two types of cloud services: IaaS (Infrastructure as a Service) and PaaS (Platform as a Service). Describe the main differences between IaaS and PaaS, and provide a use case for each.
questions.hint: Focus on key differences and real-life scenarios
